card_faces.name: Flotsam

card_faces.name: Jetsam
card_faces.oracle_text: Each opponent mills three cards, then you may cast a spell from each opponent's graveyard without paying its mana cost. If a spell cast this way would be put into a graveyard, exile it instead.

ac63941b-3f78-4bd3-8b05-ca12aaaa006c.name: Case of the Uneaten Feast
ac63941b-3f78-4bd3-8b05-ca12aaaa006c.oracle_text:
Whenever a creature you control enters, you gain 1 life.
To solve — You've gained 5 or more life this turn. (If unsolved, solve at the beginning of your end step.)
Solved — Sacrifice this Case: Creature cards in your graveyard gain "You may cast this card from your graveyard" until end of turn.

7c9acee3-12b7-41c6-8a5c-7985d052bc7a.name: Kaya, Spirits' Justice
7c9acee3-12b7-41c6-8a5c-7985d052bc7a.oracle_text:
Whenever one or more creatures you control and/or creature cards in your graveyard are put into exile, you may choose a creature card from among them. Until end of turn, target token you control becomes a copy of it, except it has flying.
+2: Surveil 2, then exile a card from a graveyard.
+1: Create a 1/1 white and black Spirit creature token with flying.
−2: Exile target creature you control. For each other player, exile up to one target creature that player controls.

eb81e343-7242-44b1-9ce6-1dddd104f764.oracle_text:
Haste

2b80feb8-5cc8-4e91-ac22-a733305a67de.oracle_text:

Whenever one or more creatures die, mill a card and put a bloodstain counter on this enchantment. Then sacrifice it if it has five or more bloodstain counters on it. When you do, return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

d87c1ed8-c644-4ad5-9a21-c7bd9a7e8d20.oracle_text: Look at the top five cards of your library, cloak two of them, and put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.
